user.title: Setup Blueprints Updater
user.description: Do you want to setup Blueprints Updater? It will scan your local blueprints and look for updates.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance of Blueprints Updater is allowed.

init.title: Settings
init.description: Configure auto-update, scanning interval, and filters for your blueprints.

reload.name: Reload blueprints
reload.description: Scans all local blueprints for new files and checks for updates immediately.
